blockaccent.config.title: Block Overlay
blockaccent.config.fillcolor.desc: The fill color of the overlay.
blockaccent.config.fillalpha.desc: Transparency of the fill color (0 = invisible, 1 = solid)
blockaccent.config.throughwalls.fill.des: Allows the fill color to be seen through walls.
blockaccent.config.showline.desc: Shows the outline of the block.
blockaccent.config.linealpha.desc: Transparency of the outline color (0 = invisible, 1 = solid)
blockaccent.config.linewidth.desc: Adjusts the thickness of the outline.
blockaccent.config.throughwalls.line.des: Allows the outline to be seen through walls.
blockaccent.config.animspeed.desc: Controls the speed of the animation.
blockaccent.config.onlycrystal.desc: Show only on obsidian/bedrock beneath crystals.
